description: False-colour satellite imagery of a ria coast near Vigo, Spain, obtained from SPOT-5 (2.5 m resolution, 1/2/3 band combination) on 2011-04-29 and 2011-08-10. The image displays land cover with healthy vegetation appearing red, water bodies as dark blue/black, and some lighter turquoise areas indicating bare land or urban features. Three yellow lines delineate specific water bodies, each labelled "8.3.2.0", which corresponds to the "Estuaries" classification in the land cover nomenclature. These delineations highlight river tributaries relevant for classifying this ria coast.
